electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 141 dB peak at 1 m, free field, pink noise crest factor 4, [KARA] preset (current 2022 Owner's Manual figure). The legacy 2017 System User Manual specs 139 dB measured with the stricter 10 dB crest-factor pink noise; reseller pages cite 139/141/142. Extends to 32 Hz only when paired with an SB18 LF element. L-Acoustics publishes bandwidth at -10 dB only; no -3 dB figure exists.
electroacoustic.directivity: Horizontal: 110 degrees symmetric, fixed (no secondary lobes). Vertical: variable, set by number of elements and array curvature (WST line source), inter-element angles 0 to 10 degrees.
electroacoustic.components: 2-way active, bi-amplified: LF 2 x 8" neodymium weather-resistant cone drivers (bass-reflex loaded); HF 1 x 3" neodymium diaphragm compression driver on DOSC waveguide. RMS power handling LF 450 W, HF 80 W.

operating_modes: 2-way active, bi-amplified: one amp channel drives LF, one drives HF
amplification.per_amplifier_note: Per the LA8 manual Table 3, the LA8 drives 3 KARA per output pair (1/2 and 3/4) for 6 KARA total: 3 / 6. App value: 4 per LA4X (and per LA4 in the original era); the 2022 OM adds LA12X. Touring racks (LA-RAK / LA-RAK II AVB) house three LA8 / three LA12X.
amplification.preset_note: [KARA] is the reference long-throw preset (full-range response); [KARA_FI] is the flat short-throw fill preset with a 100 Hz HPF. SB18 companion presets [SB18_60]/[SB_60_C] (60 Hz crossover, separated/cardioid) and [SB_100]/[SB_100_C] (100 Hz crossover, coupled/cardioid) extend the low end.

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), wired in parallel: 1 IN + 1 LINK for daisy-chaining. Pinout: 1+/1- = LF, 2+/2- = HF (L-Acoustics 2-way active pinout).
connection.breakouts: Multi-enclosure cabling via DOFILL-LA8 (8-point PA-COM to 2x 4-point speakON, feeds two 2-way active enclosures) or DO3WFILL (8-point PA-COM to 3x speakON, one 2-way active + two passive); DOSUB-LA8 (8-point PA-COM to 4x 2-point speakON, four subs). DO cables (8-point PA-COM trunk) and SP cables (4-point speakON) complete the loom; upstream multipin is PA-COM/CA-COM on the LA-RAK.

physical.cabinet: Premium (first) grade Baltic birch plywood; coated steel front grill with acoustically neutral 3D Airnet fabric; high-grade steel rigging with anti-corrosion coating. Finish: Dark grey brown (Pantone 426 C); Pure white RAL 9010 was offered on the KARAi install version. Note: older 2017 System User Manual states IP45; current official rating is IP55.

modes: Flown line source array (M-BUMP frame, optional M-BAR)
deployment.max_per_flown_array: M-BUMP (+ optional M-BAR): up to 24 KARA (nominal max single array); with KARA-PULLBACK pullback: 16 KARA. Mixed flown: 12 KARA + 4 SB18. KARA-MINIBU: up to 6 KARA. Ground-stacked (no accessory): 4 KARA, or 9 KARA + 4 SB18 mixed on M-BUMP+M-BAR+M-JACK+KARA-ANGARMEX platform.

usage: Original (2009) variable-curvature WST line source: the modular 2-way active K-Series box that the current Kara II later replaced, suited to medium/long-throw FOH, central clusters and side hangs in touring and install.

Each KARA is a bi-amplified 2-way needing 2 amp channels (LF + HF); on the legacy controllers budget 6 KARA per LA8 (3 per output pair) and 4 per LA4X/LA4, with LA12X supported per the 2022 Owner's Manual.

Drive with [KARA] for the reference long-throw response and [KARA_FI] for flat short-throw fills (100 Hz HPF); fixed 110 degrees horizontal coverage means curvature is shaped purely by the vertical inter-element angles (0 to 10 degrees).
Extend the low end with SB18 subwoofers (system reaches 32 Hz) using the [SB18_60]/[SB_60_C] 60 Hz or [SB_100]/[SB_100_C] 100 Hz crossover presets, separated or cardioid as the room needs.

Fly on M-BUMP (+ optional M-BAR) up to 24 KARA, on KARA-MINIBU up to 6 KARA, or ground-stack up to 4 KARA (9 KARA + 4 SB18 mixed); set negative site angle with KARA-PULLBACK and extra downtilt with KARA-ANGARMEX.
Always model the array in SOUNDVISION before rigging to confirm mechanical safety factors and tilt; the IP55 rating and birch enclosure suit touring and limited outdoor exposure.
source_manual: Kara Owner's Manual (EN) version 2.1 (2022 revision; Kara_OM_EN.pdf, includes rigging manual + specifications appendix); KARA System User Manual (EN) v2.1 (legacy 2017, cabling/preset focused); KARA Product Information v8.0 (ML)
